continuity_review should record its source.
continuity_review should record its status.
continuity_review should come from the live creative model, not fallback.
Continuity review should provide at least two freshness targets.
Continuity review should provide caption advice.
Continuity review should provide image advice.
Novelty ledger should track at least one recent semantic entry.
Novelty ledger should track multiple semantic dimensions.
Reflection notes should offer at least one guidance note.
World state should expose a typed daypart.
World state should expose a mobility window.
World state should expose at least one need-state.
Affordance pool should surface at least three affordances.
Scene plan candidates should contain at least three semantic candidates.
Scene plan candidates should be produced by the code-owned planner.
Selected scene candidate should record the chosen candidate id.
Selected scene candidate should refer to an existing candidate.
